requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety (IEC 62368-1 / 240 V 50 Hz / Type G Plug)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全（IEC 62368-1 / 240 V 50 Hz / G型插头）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全（IEC 62368-1 / 240 V 50 Hz / G型插頭）

summary.en: Kuwait operates at 240 V / 50 Hz with British-style Type G (BS 1363) three-pin square plugs. Electrical safety for wireless and electronic devices is governed by KSO (Kuwait Standards and Metrology Organization) under the Ministry of Commerce and Industry (MOCI). The primary safety standard adopted is IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, information and communications technology equipment — Safety requirements). MOCI import clearance requires evidence of conformity to the applicable electrical safety standard. Products must be rated and tested for 240 V / 50 Hz operation; Type G plug and socket compatibility is required for mains-powered devices.
summary.zh: 科威特采用240 V / 50 Hz供电，使用英式G型（BS 1363）三孔方形插头。无线及电子设备的电气安全由KSO（科威特标准与计量局）在商业与工业部（MOCI）下管理。采用的主要安全标准为IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息及通信技术设备 — 安全要求）。MOCI进口清关要求提供符合适用电气安全标准的证明。产品须按240 V / 50 Hz额定并测试；有线供电设备须兼容G型插头及插座。
summary.zht: 科威特採用240 V / 50 Hz供電，使用英式G型（BS 1363）三孔方形插頭。無線及電子設備的電氣安全由KSO（科威特標準與計量局）在商業與工業部（MOCI）下管理。採用的主要安全標準為IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊及通信技術設備 — 安全要求）。MOCI進口清關要求提供符合適用電氣安全標準的證明。產品須按240 V / 50 Hz額定並測試；有線供電裝置須相容G型插頭及插座。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1:2023 (Audio/video, information and communications technology equipment — Safety requirements)
BS 1363 (UK / Kuwait Type G plug and socket standard)
KSO electrical safety standards (adoption of IEC series)
Kuwait Ministry of Commerce and Industry (MOCI) import regulations

summary.en: China uses 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A and Type I sockets (GB 2099.1 / GB 1002). Electrical safety for IT and audio/video equipment is covered by CCC (China Compulsory Certification) to GB 4943.1 (aligned to IEC 60950-1, now transitioning to IEC 62368-1 / GB 4943.23). CCC applies to a defined list of products and is administered by CNCA. Products are tested and certified for 220 V / 50 Hz operation.
summary.zh: 中国采用220 V / 50 Hz，使用A型和I型插座（GB 2099.1 / GB 1002）。信息技术及音视频设备的电气安全由CCC（中国强制认证）依据GB 4943.1（对标IEC 60950-1，现转型为IEC 62368-1 / GB 4943.23）覆盖。CCC适用于规定目录内的产品，由CNCA管理。产品按220 V / 50 Hz额定并测试。
summary.zht: 中國採用220 V / 50 Hz，使用A型和I型插座（GB 2099.1 / GB 1002）。資訊技術及音視頻設備的電氣安全由CCC（中國強制認證）依據GB 4943.1（對標IEC 60950-1，現轉型為IEC 62368-1 / GB 4943.23）覆蓋。CCC適用於規定目錄內的產品，由CNCA管理。產品按220 V / 50 Hz額定並測試。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (Safety of ITE, aligned to IEC 60950-1; transitioning to GB 4943.23 / IEC 62368-1)
GB 2099.1 / GB 1002 (CN plug and socket standards — Type A/I, 220 V)

gap.en: CCC certification (GB 4943.1 / GB 4943.23) is not recognized by KSO or MOCI for Kuwait market access. Significant electrical infrastructure differences exist: Kuwait uses 240 V / 50 Hz (vs China's 220 V / 50 Hz) and Type G plugs (vs China's Type A/I). Mains-powered devices must be re-rated and tested for 240 V operation; power supplies and adapters must carry a Type G plug or the product must be supplied with an appropriate adapter. New IEC 62368-1 test reports from an accredited laboratory are required for MOCI import clearance.
gap.zh: CCC认证（GB 4943.1 / GB 4943.23）不被KSO或MOCI承认，不能用于进入科威特市场。存在显著电气基础设施差异：科威特采用240 V / 50 Hz（而中国为220 V / 50 Hz）及G型插头（而中国为A/I型）。有线供电设备须重新按240 V额定并测试；电源及适配器须配备G型插头，或产品须附带适当适配器。MOCI进口清关需要来自认可实验室的新IEC 62368-1测试报告。
gap.zht: CCC認證（GB 4943.1 / GB 4943.23）不被KSO或MOCI承認，不能用於進入科威特市場。存在顯著電氣基礎設施差異：科威特採用240 V / 50 Hz（而中國為220 V / 50 Hz）及G型插頭（而中國為A/I型）。有線供電裝置須重新按240 V額定並測試；電源及適配器須配備G型插頭，或產品須附帶適當適配器。MOCI進口清關需要來自認可實驗室的新IEC 62368-1測試報告。

source.publisher: KSO — Kuwait Standards and Metrology Organization

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety conformance to IEC 62368-1 is required for Kuwait market access. Chinese CCC (GB 4943.1/GB 4943.23) is not accepted. Products must be rated and tested for 240 V / 50 Hz, and mains-powered devices must use or accept a Type G (BS 1363) plug. New test reports from an accredited laboratory are required for MOCI import clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合IEC 62368-1的电气安全合规是进入科威特市场的必要条件。中国CCC（GB 4943.1/GB 4943.23）不被接受。产品须按240 V / 50 Hz额定并测试，有线供电设备须使用或兼容G型（BS 1363）插头。MOCI进口清关需要来自认可实验室的新测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合IEC 62368-1的電氣安全合規是進入科威特市場的必要條件。中國CCC（GB 4943.1/GB 4943.23）不被接受。產品須按240 V / 50 Hz額定並測試，有線供電裝置須使用或相容G型（BS 1363）插頭。MOCI進口清關需要來自認可實驗室的新測試報告。
